query:
SELECT id, status, project_name, created_at, 
  JSON_LENGTH(test_files) as file_count,
  JSON_LENGTH(behaviors) as behavior_count,
  validated_proofs
FROM analyses 
ORDER BY created_at DESC 
LIMIT 5;

  JSON_LENGTH(behaviors) as behavior_count,
